title: Jon Cohen, Jon Cohen@Windermere Realty Trust | Raleigh Hills Business Association
description: May: Jon Cohen, Jon Cohen@Windermere Realty Trust. Focusing on Jon's experience as a lawyer, helping navigate 1st time home buyers. Jon will be sharing his experience and passion and involvement with Positive Charge!PDX
